trans-unit.source: Already connected to AppHost backchannel.
App host exited unexpectedly.
AppHost is incompatible with the CLI. The AppHost must be updated to a version that supports the {0} capability.
trans-unit.target: AppHost, CLI ile uyumsuzdur. AppHost, bu {0} yeteneğini destekleyen bir sürüme güncelleştirilmelidir.

trans-unit.source: AppHost file was specified in '{0}' but it does not exist at '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: AppHost dosyası '{0}' dosyasında belirtilmiş ancak '{1}' konumunda mevcut değil.

trans-unit.source: No buildable app hosts were found, but there may have been unbuildable app hosts.
trans-unit.target: Derlenebilir uygulama ana işlemleri bulunamadı, ancak derlenemeyen uygulama ana işlemleri olabilir.

trans-unit.source: AspireHostingVersion is null
The Aspire.Hosting package version {0} is not supported. Please update to the latest version.
trans-unit.target: Aspire.Hosting paketinin {0} sürümü desteklenmiyor. Lütfen en son sürüme güncelleştirin.

trans-unit.source: Bundle is already extracted and up to date. Use --force to re-extract.
trans-unit.target: Bundle is already extracted and up to date. Use --force to re-extract.

trans-unit.source: Bundle extracted to {0}
Bundle was extracted to {0} but layout validation failed.
trans-unit.target: Bundle was extracted to {0} but layout validation failed.

trans-unit.source: Cannot use --watch and --no-build at the same time.
Developer certificates may not be fully trusted (trust exit code was: {0}).
trans-unit.target: Geliştirici sertifikaları tam olarak güvenilir olmayabilir (güven çıkış kodu şuydu: {0}).

trans-unit.source: This command is not yet supported with single file AppHosts.
trans-unit.target: Bu komut, tek dosya Uygulama Ana İşlemlerinde henüz desteklenmemektedir.

trans-unit.source: Configuration key {0} not found.
Configuration key is required.
Configuration value is required.
Could not determine the CLI executable path.
trans-unit.target: Could not determine the CLI executable path.

trans-unit.source: Could not determine the installation path.
trans-unit.target: Could not determine the installation path.

trans-unit.source: Could not parse Aspire.Hosting package version.
Error deleting configuration: {0}
Error setting configuration: {0}
Expected a .csproj file, got: {0}
Aspire Extension is incompatible with the CLI. The Extension must be updated to a version that supports the {0} capability.
trans-unit.target: Aspire Uzantısı, CLI ile uyumsuz. Uzantı, bu {0} özelliğini destekleyen bir sürüme güncelleştirilmelidir.

trans-unit.source: The Aspire extension token must be set if ASPIRE_EXTENSION_ENDPOINT is set. Please ensure that ASPIRE_EXTENSION_TOKEN is set
trans-unit.target: ASPIRE_EXTENSION_ENDPOINT ayarlandığında, Aspire uzantı belirteci ayarlanmalıdır. Lütfen ASPIRE_EXTENSION_TOKEN'ın ayarlandığından emin olun.
trans-unit.note: Do not localize ASPIRE_EXTENSION_TOKEN and ASPIRE_EXTENSION_ENDPOINT

trans-unit.source: Failed to build AppHost server.
Failed to build capability scanner.
Failed to build SDK generation server.
trans-unit.target: Failed to build SDK generation server.

trans-unit.source: Failed to install {0} dependencies.
Failed to parse template version from stdout.
Failed to prepare AppHost server.
Failed to publish {0} AppHost: {1}
Failed to retrieve template packages via cache.
Failed to run {0} AppHost: {1}
Failed to search for packages. Exit code: {0}.
Generated {0} files in {1}
GuestRuntime not initialized.
GuestRuntime not initialized. This is a bug.
trans-unit.target: GuestRuntime not initialized. This is a bug.

trans-unit.source: Integration project not found: {0}
Invalid integration argument '{0}'. Expected a .csproj path or PackageName@Version format.
trans-unit.target: Invalid integration argument '{0}'. Expected a .csproj path or PackageName@Version format.

trans-unit.source: Invalid locale {0} provided will not be used.
Invalid package format '{0}'. Expected PackageName@Version (e.g. Aspire.Hosting.Redis@9.2.0).
trans-unit.target: Invalid package format '{0}'. Expected PackageName@Version (e.g. Aspire.Hosting.Redis@9.2.0).

trans-unit.source: The provided extension socket path needs two valid parts.
trans-unit.target: Sağlanan uzantı yuva yolunun iki geçerli bileşeni olmalıdır.

trans-unit.source: Invalid version '{0}' in '{1}'. Expected a valid NuGet version (e.g. 9.2.0).
trans-unit.target: Invalid version '{0}' in '{1}'. Expected a valid NuGet version (e.g. 9.2.0).

trans-unit.source: The Aspire CLI requires .NET SDK version {0} or later. Detected: {1}.
trans-unit.target: Aspire CLI için .NET SDK sürümünün {0} veya daha yeni olması gerekiyor. Algılanan: {1}.

trans-unit.source: Multiple project files found.
This CLI binary does not contain an embedded bundle. No extraction needed.
trans-unit.target: This CLI binary does not contain an embedded bundle. No extraction needed.

trans-unit.source: No project file found.
Input was required for prompt '{0}' but not provided.
trans-unit.target: '{0}' istemi için giriş gerekli ancak sağlanmadı.

trans-unit.source: The project could not be analyzed due to a build error. See logs at {0}
trans-unit.target: The project could not be analyzed due to a build error. See logs at {0}

trans-unit.source: Project file does not exist.
Could not build: {0}
Project file is not an Aspire AppHost project.
trans-unit.target: Proje dosyası bir Aspire AppHost projesi değil.

trans-unit.source: The project does not contain an Aspire apphost.
Unable to retrieve the assembly version.
Unsupported language: {0}
Unsupported locale {0} provided will not be used. Supported locales are: {1}.
trans-unit.target: Sağlanan desteklenmeyen {0} yerel ayarı kullanılmayacaktır. Desteklenen yerel ayarlar: {1}.
trans-unit.note: {1} is a comma-separated list of locales.
